popularStory.headline: My Maternal 21st Great Grandmother, Lady Margaret Crawford (Douglas)
popularStory.description:
Brief Life History of Margaret
Lady Margaret Crawford was born on 8 March 1187, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland. 
She married first Walter Barclay and had David Barclay
She married second Archibald …

zh.Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德
zh.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Crawford是Sir John de Crauford和Galfridus的女兒，於1187年3月8日出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德。她於1220年之前與Archibald Douglas 2nd Laird Of Douglas在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1225年4月在蘇格蘭藍納可爾享年38歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭斯可迪夏 波德斯梅露絲梅露絲 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Crawford是Sir John de Crauford和Galfridus的女儿，于1187年3月8日出生在苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德。她于1220年之前与Archibald Douglas 2nd Laird Of Douglas在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1225年4月在苏格兰藍納可爾享年38岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰斯可迪夏 波德斯梅露絲梅露絲 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Crawford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various places called Crawford, primarily the one in Lanarkshire (Scotland), and possibly also from the one in Lancashire. Both are named in Old English with crāwe ‘crow’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Crafford
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish: variant of   Crawford  .

variants.name: Crofoot
meanings: English: variant ofCrowfoot, a nickname for someone with splayed feet or someother deformity of the foot, from Old English crāwe ‘crow’ +fōt ‘foot’. In Middle English crou-fot also denotedthe buttercup, and it may be from this sense that the name arose,although the reason for its adoption is unclear.

variants.name: Crofut
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of Crawford or Crowfoot (see Crofoot ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Crawford was born on 8 March 1187, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland as the daughter of Sir John de Crauford and Galfridus. She married Archibald Douglas 2nd Laird Of Douglas before 1220, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in April 1225, in Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 38, and was buried in Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders: Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Crawford est née le 8 mars 1187, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse, fille de Sir John de Crauford et Galfridus. Elle a épousé Archibald Douglas 2nd Laird Of Douglas avant 1220, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en avril 1225, à Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Crawford wurde am 8. März 1187 in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, als Tochter von Sir John de Crauford und Galfridus geboren. Sie hat vor 1220 in Scotland Archibald Douglas 2nd Laird Of Douglas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb im April 1225 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Lanarkshire, Scotland und wurde in Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Crawfordは1187年3月8日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードでSir John de CraufordとGalfridusの娘として生まれた。1220年以前にスコットランドでArchibald Douglas 2nd Laird Of Douglasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1225年4月にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアで38歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドスコッティッシュ ボルダースメルローゼメルローゼ アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders: 영국 스코틀랜드 스콧이시 볼더스 멜로즈 멜로즈 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Crawford(은)는 1187년 3월 8일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 Sir John de Crauford(와)과 Galfridus의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1220년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Archibald Douglas 2nd Laird Of Douglas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1225년 4월 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 스콧이시 볼더스 멜로즈 멜로즈 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Crawford nasceu em 8 de março de 1187, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland filha de Sir John de Crauford e Galfridus. Ela casou-se com Archibald Douglas 2nd Laird Of Douglas antes 1220, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em abril de 1225, em Lanarkshire, Scotland, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders: мелрос эбби, мелрос, скоттиш бордирс, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Crawford родилась 8 марта 1187 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия. Её родителей звали Sir John de Crauford и Galfridus. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Archibald Douglas 2nd Laird Of Douglas перед 1220 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла апрель 1225 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности мелрос эбби, мелрос, скоттиш бордирс, Шотландия, Великобритания.
